\tzpentry{ID5580}{Quantum State Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5580 introduces Quantum State Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ R(t) e^{i\Psi(t)} = \frac{1}{N}\sum_{j=1}^N e^{i\phi_j(t)}\,. \tag{2}\]
